recommendations.title: Amanda
recommendations.overview: David, who gets by doing odd jobs, meets Léna, who has just moved up to Paris, and falls in love. But soon after, his life is brutally interrupted by the sudden death of his sister. Beyond the shock, and the pain, David now finds himself alone with h

recommendations.title: Regret!
recommendations.overview: A David's classmate, Jochem, is harassed by three bullies, but nobody does anything at school, not even David, who feels guilty for not pointing out the culprits.

recommendations.title: I Love You, Stupid
recommendations.overview: Marcos' life turns upside down after he loses the same day his girlfriend and his job. Marcos' life turns wild after to meet Raquel.

recommendations.title: The Invisible Thread
recommendations.overview: The teenage son of two fathers makes a documentary film about his parents but is surprised when a real-life plot twist occurs in his family.

recommendations.title: Operações Especiais
recommendations.overview: In a crime-plagued area of Rio de Janeiro, a team of honest cops, including a determined rookie, fights corruption and mistrust on all sides.

recommendations.title: Searching

recommendations.title: Tim Maia
recommendations.overview: Biopic of Brazilian singer Tim Maia, from his childhood in Rio de Janeiro until his death at age 55, including his passage by the US, where he discovers a new style of music and is arrested for theft and drug possession.

recommendations.title: WarGames
